g.text: - Runway must be of suitable configuration for aircraft type
- Minimum separation time between assigned flights
- Each flight must be assigned to exactly one runway at a time
- Departure time must be updated with appropriate delay when reassigned
- No two flights assigned overlapping slots on same runway within minimum separation time
- Separation rules must be enforced for all flight pairs using same runway within time window
- Permission partial order: Admin >= Execute/Write >= Read
- Each operation must transition from a defined pre-state to a defined post-state
// Manages slots for scheduling flights on runways
// Provides real-time runway closure and availability information
// Stores aircraft types, current traffic data, and flight schedules
// Contains rules for wake turbulence and runway spacing
